title: 30Pack Artificial Pine Picks, 6inch Flocked Holly Christmas Red and White Berry Picks Stems, Christmas Picks and Sprays Faux Floral Picks with Pinecones for DIY Gift Floral Arrangements
features: [High Quality]: The winter spray berries fruits are made of premium foam material, with pine cone and plastic pine needles, durable and lightweight, not fading and not easy to break. Each Christmas berry pine branch is decorated with traces of snowflakes, which is very suitable for the atmosphere of snow in winter.

[Size]: Package of 15pcs red and white artificial holly berry stems , Each Christmas floral pick is about 15cm/6inches height; You can stick or plug these christmas berry branch between branches to break up the green in your xmas tree or garland, create the festival atmosphere and natural touch for your activities

[DIY Crafts]: These Christmas picks nice to gift card making, paper crafts, theme invitations, pocket scrapbooks, album decoration; DIY Christmas wreath or bouquets, arrangement, gifting prop, or as gifts for family or friends.

[Winter Picks]: Each red and white berry stems with snowy red plump berries, mini pinecones, flocked greenery pine needles and hemp rope bowknot, the floral stem is wrapped in kraft paper, full of natural color

[Christmas Decor]: These Christmas berry twig branches are quite festive ideal for Christmas tree decoration, DIY Christmas garland wreath, Christmas centerpieces, holiday floral arrangement, home, hotels, wedding, office, garden, decoration for table, shop window decor, floral arrangements, centerpieces, photography props, etc.
